descriptionText: If you are looking for a classic, well-cared-for Turkish schooner, this Custom Gulet for sale 2005 deserves a closer look. Built by the respected Tum Tour yard in Marmaris and flying the Italian flag.On deck you will find the familiar gulet layout: a wide beam, generous bulwarks and expansive teak areas that make movement safe for children and guests. The cockpit is finished in laid teak and protected by a rigid bimini.Sail handling is assisted by electric winches, plus an automatic pilot and electronic suite that includes chart plotter, radar, wind station and depth sounder . When conditions dictate, the 280 hp diesel pushes her along economically; fuel consumption at the 7-knot cruising speed and 9 knots maximum is reported to be modest, giving a range of about 1200 nmi.Below, warm varnished timber and natural light create the comfortable atmosphere that makes gulets so popular with families. Four guest cabins with en-suite heads offer berths for eight guests. Air-conditioning and heating extend the cruising season, and an oven, microwave, fridge-freezer make life aboard easy . A generator supply ample power at anchor, backed up by an inverter and battery charger .Because she was built to operate as an Italian charter vessel, safety gear is of a higher standard than is often found on private boats of this size. The package includes multiple electric and manual bilge pumps .Specifications • Builder: Tum Tour, Marmaris, Turkey • Material: wood • Launch year: 2005 • Length overall: 20 m • Beam: 5.5 m • Draft: 2.0 m • Flag: Italy • Displacement: 50,000 kg • Engine: 1 × Tum Tour 280 hp diesel, 7 430 h • Transmission: shaft drive, bronze 3-blade propeller • Fuel capacity: 1400 L (diesel) • Fresh water: 1000 L • Black water: 1 000 L • Cabins: 4 guest • Heads / showers: 4 • Sails: Full-batten main, furling genoa, staysail • Deck finish: Teak cockpit and side decks • Electrics: Generator, inverter, shore power, wind generator • Navigation: Radar, chart plotter, autopilot, wind/depth instruments, VHF • Comfort: Air-conditioning, heating, microwave, fridge-freezerThis Custom Gulet for sale 2005 offers a balanced combination of traditional craftsmanship and the modern equipment expected by today’s owners. She is in good condition. For sailors seeking a characterful yacht that can cruise comfortably with family or guests. Contact us for more details or to book a viewing!
descriptionHtml:
If you are looking for a classic, well-cared-for Turkish schooner, this Custom Gulet for sale 2005 deserves a closer look. Built by the respected Tum Tour yard in Marmaris and flying the Italian flag.

On deck you will find the familiar gulet layout: a wide beam, generous bulwarks and expansive teak areas that make movement safe for children and guests. The cockpit is finished in laid teak and protected by a rigid bimini.

Sail handling is assisted by electric winches, plus an automatic pilot and electronic suite that includes chart plotter, radar, wind station and depth sounder . When conditions dictate, the 280 hp diesel pushes her along economically; fuel consumption at the 7-knot cruising speed and 9 knots maximum is reported to be modest, giving a range of about 1200 nmi.

Below, warm varnished timber and natural light create the comfortable atmosphere that makes gulets so popular with families. Four guest cabins with en-suite heads offer berths for eight guests. Air-conditioning and heating extend the cruising season, and an oven, microwave, fridge-freezer make life aboard easy . A generator supply ample power at anchor, backed up by an inverter and battery charger .

Because she was built to operate as an Italian charter vessel, safety gear is of a higher standard than is often found on private boats of this size. The package includes multiple electric and manual bilge pumps .

Specifications
• Builder: Tum Tour, Marmaris, Turkey
• Material: wood
• Launch year: 2005
• Length overall: 20 m
• Beam: 5.5 m
• Draft: 2.0 m
• Flag: Italy
• Displacement: 50,000 kg
• Engine: 1 × Tum Tour 280 hp diesel, 7 430 h
• Transmission: shaft drive, bronze 3-blade propeller
• Fuel capacity: 1400 L (diesel)
• Fresh water: 1000 L
• Black water: 1 000 L
• Cabins: 4 guest
• Heads / showers: 4
• Sails: Full-batten main, furling genoa, staysail
• Deck finish: Teak cockpit and side decks
• Electrics: Generator, inverter, shore power, wind generator
• Navigation: Radar, chart plotter, autopilot, wind/depth instruments, VHF
• Comfort: Air-conditioning, heating, microwave, fridge-freezer

This Custom Gulet for sale 2005 offers a balanced combination of traditional craftsmanship and the modern equipment expected by today’s owners. She is in good condition. For sailors seeking a characterful yacht that can cruise comfortably with family or guests. Contact us for more details or to book a viewing!
